import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react' import '../css/passenger_info.css' import bkash from '../assets/logo/bkash.png' import nagad from '../assets/logo/Nagad.png' import rocket from '../assets/logo/rocket.png' import upay from '../assets/logo/upay.png' import visa from '../assets/logo/visa.png' import mastercard from '../assets/logo/mastercard.png' import dutchbangla from '../assets/logo/dutch-bangla.png' import { useSelector } from 'react-redux' export default function Passanger_info() { const [payment_method, setPayment_method] = useState('mobile-banking') const [total_amount, setTotal_Amount] = useState(null) let initial_amount=0 console.log(payment_method) useEffect(() => { console.log(payment_method) }, [payment_method]) const train = useSelector((state) => state.var.train) const user=useSelector((state)=>state.var.logged)[0] console.log('user',user) const [passenger_details, setPassenger_Details] = useState([]) const newDetails = [] useEffect(() => { if (train && train.length > 0) { // Ensure train is defined and not empty const newDetails = train.map(() => ({ name: '', passenger_type: 'Adult', can_change:0 })); setPassenger_Details(newDetails); setTotal_Amount(train[train.length - 1]); initial_amount=train[train.length]-1 } }, [train]); // Add train as a dependency const handlePassenger_Details = (e, index) => { const updatedPassenger_Details = [...passenger_details] console.log(train) if(e.target.name=='passenger_type' && passenger_details[index].passenger_type=='Adult' && e.target.value=='Child'){ setTotal_Amount(parseInt(total_amount) - (parseInt(train[index][3])*.5)) }else if(e.target.name=='passenger_type' && passenger_details[index].passenger_type=='Child' && e.target.value=='Adult'){ setTotal_Amount(parseInt(total_amount) + (parseInt(train[index][3])*.5)) } updatedPassenger_Details[index] = { ...updatedPassenger_Details[index], [e.target.name]: e.target.value } setPassenger_Details(updatedPassenger_Details) } return ( <>

Purchase Ticket



PASSENGER DETAILS

{train.map((item, index) => { if (typeof (item) == 'object') { if(index==0){ return (

Passanger {index + 1}

Name *

Passenger Type

) }else{ return (

Passanger {index + 1}

Name *

handlePassenger_Details(e, index)} value={passenger_details[index]?.name || ''} />

Passenger Type

) } } })}

CONTACT INFORMATION

PARABAT EXPRESS (709) [S_CHAIR]

Dhaka-Sylhet

Departure : Wed, 09 oct 2024, 06;30 AM
Coach: DA
Seat Type: Shovon Chair
Seats: DA
{/* ----------------------------------payment----------------------------------------- */}

PAYMENT DETAILS


Total Amount Payable: ৳{total_amount ? total_amount : '00'}
By clicking on the "PROCEED TO PAYMENT" button below, you acknowledge that you have read and agreed to the Terms & Conditions
Please complete your payment within 15 minutes, otherwise your seat(s) will be cancelled.
Provision for case in which tickets have been issued for trains not having room available for additional passenger:
  • Fares shall be deemed to be accepted, and tickets to be issued, subject to the condition of there being room available in the train for which the tickets are issued.

  • A person to whom a ticket has been issued and for whom there is not room available in the train for which the ticket was issued shall on returning the ticket within three hours after the departure of the train be entitled to have his fare at once refunded.

  • A person for whom there is not room available for the class of carriage for which he has purchased a ticket and who is obliged to travel in a carriage of a lower class shall be entitled on delivering up his ticket to a refund of the difference between the fare paid by him and the fare payable for the class of carriage in which he traveled.
